title: MANGA NGE The Special Manga editions
display_title: MANGA NGE The Special Manga editions
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] The Special Manga editions             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Jun 25, 2007 1:16 pm Hey , I Have both Volume 7 Special Cristmas editions Rei And Asuka , I personally think They both look awsome The pack basicly contents A Asuka/Rei Figure + A Special Edition (JPN) of Volume Seven .. A Beatiful cover jacket and also a amazing art work By YS . I'll Try to post some Pic's soon . Who here knows anything about any other Special edition NGE manga's ? Thanks .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 25, 2007 3:13 pm There have been three collector versions. There were the two Christmas versions for volume 7. And there was one for volume 9.

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Wed Jun 27, 2007 2:38 pm Thanks ! I've Serached around for the 9th special editon It's Heck of a rare these days and kinda over priced but i'll try to get both Rei / Asuka , BTW : Love the way the figure looks and high heels .. w00tt.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 27, 2007 2:46 pm Coded to the Core wrote: Thanks ! I've Serached around for the 9th special editon It's Heck of a rare these days and kinda over priced but i'll try to get both Rei / Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Fri Jun 29, 2007 3:54 am So the Asuka Version doesnt come with the 9th volume , I've seen some bad review about the mini figure around the net , Which is okay with me i am not planning on opening the box anyway i am just adding it to the collection both Asuka and Rei Versions . I mean for a guy who'd spend 100$ for a Asuka figure i think i'll do alright with those .. :P. BTW Eva monkey i know you're not into figures and all that hype but are you thinking about getting the Eva01 headphones ? I don't know i may get them by a Proxy third party .. It's just they're too expensive . I wish they'd make a Eva02 one :P . Anyway thanks for help

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 29, 2007 2:35 pm Coded to the Core wrote: are you thinking about getting the Eva01 headphones?

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Sun Sep 09, 2007 2:50 pm I opened my Asuka Christmas Special edition thingy .. Couldnt resist i wanted to see the manga!! Was that a mistake ? ... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Sun Sep 09, 2007 2:54 pm I have the Asuka figurine. It's nice to have since I'm a die-hard Asuka fan, but like Eva Monkey said it's not really a toy, or even something to take out of the box and pose on your desk. (And I think the high heels are silly.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 09, 2007 2:59 pm I recently read somewhere that just by buying whatever it is that's a Special edition thing, the value is already decreased, so you might as well open it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 22, 2007 2:22 pm Basically, any of those Special Edition Manga versions aren't worth it? Actually, weren't there some versions of that Manga Viz released that were supposedly special editions in some way? Why exactly?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 22, 2007 5:20 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Basically, any of those Special Edition Manga versions aren't worth it?

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Sat Sep 22, 2007 7:06 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Basically, any of those Special Edition Manga versions aren't worth it?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 22, 2007 8:27 pm Apathetic Piggy wrote: I'll contest to that

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 22, 2007 8:31 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Me = Proper English Prick.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 22, 2007 8:38 pm Uh oh. Looks like I just got... And I have determined that I have made that mistake a total of 5 times on this board.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 22, 2007 8:54 pm @ Image: @ Monkey: Thanks for the reply, I was wondering about that. And apparently my copy of Volume 1 is a Second Edition. I think. @ Apathetic Piggy: Aren't the written statements done by the Seiyuu (Megumi Ogata, Yuko Miyamura, Megumi Hayashibara) included in the US release of the Manga? http://www.evamonkey.com/em_writings.php

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 22, 2007 8:55 pm The Eva Monkey wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Sun Sep 23, 2007 2:02 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Apathetic Piggy wrote: I'll contest to that

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 23, 2007 11:40 am Having both Standard and Special editions of the 1st edition, as well as all of the 2nd editions, as well as the original Japanese volumes (did I mention I collect books?), I can say for certain that in terms of extra material, the 2nd edition format includes all of the extras that were in the original Japanese volumes, as well as all of the extras written specifically for the English version by Carl Horn. The only thing not included (which I would like to make available at some point) is the "Misato's fan service" letter column that Carl ran in the original issue based comics. From what I recall reading, it's generally light fare, however Carl has expressed to me that there are some interesting and insightful gems in there, particularly the ones around them time that Columbine and 9/11 happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 23, 2007 1:46 pm Thanks for the headsup. If I end up collecting the rest of the Manga when it's released Stateside (Ha! THAT'S gonna be a while!) I know to collect the 2nd Edition versions. (My copy of Volume 1 has the header "Viz Action", and the inside copyright info says "Action Edition, Third Printing, January 2006" if that means anything on whether or not its a 2nd Edition version.) @ Monkey: Do the Japanese releases of the Manga have furigana (Kana written next to the Kanji for kids that didn't learn certain words yet) or not? I kinda doubt it, seeing as probably when the Manga is run in that Comic Anthology there is, but most likely not in the real deal. Just wondering.
